---
title: "In Praise of Documentation"
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: serif
---

# How I learned to love documentation

---

![BBC Micro](images/bbc_micro.jpg){width=50%}

---

![BBC BASIC](images/bbc_basic.gif){width=50%}

--- 

![User Guide](images/bbc_micro_user_guide.jpg){width=50%}

---

![BBC Micro User](images/bbc_micro_user.jpg){width=50%}

---

The perils of poor documentation

--- 

![Enshitification](images/enshitification.jpg){width=50%}

---
